sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.72b (beta): internal maintenance — the security-stack/CDN display names (Cloudflare/Sucuri/Akamai/Imperva, BunnyCDN/Fastly) are now single-sourced in one canonical map with an executable drift-guard test, so the pre-scan modal and the same-site CDN dialog can never disagree on a name. No visible or behavioral change. Carries all of 1.7.71b (empty-selection Start Scan guard) and 1.7.70b.
